channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Federal Judge Reluctantly Dismisses Proud Boys Jan. 6 Case
item.description: A federal judge on Friday dismissed with prejudice the criminal case against four Proud Boys members convicted in connection with the Jan. 6, 2021, Ca...

item.title: Iran’s Plot to Assassinate Trump Foiled by Israeli Warning
WATCH: GOP senator warns 'hammer-and-sickle' politics will define Democrats' 2028 primary
item.description: Sen. Eric Schmitt warns the progressive surge toppling Democratic incumbents in New York and Michigan will define the party's 2028 presidential primar...

item.title: USDA: California and 40 Other States Have Cost Over $10B in Government Waste via SNAP Mistakes
